programme.title: Business Unusual
programme.desc: Kendra, who is overwhelmed by Kevin's helicopter parenting, tricks him into taking a job with his old partner, Vanessa, who now operates her own private security company.

programme.title: Kevin Goes Nuts
programme.desc: Kevin goes undercover to find out the truth when Vanessa suggests that Sara has a secret boyfriend. Meanwhile, Jack desperately searches for an illness he can claim as his own after the "cool" kids with peanut allergies learn he's been lying about sharing their malady.

programme.title: Plus One Is The Loneliest Number
programme.desc: Kevin steps in as Vanessa's "successful doctor" date at her sister's wedding, in an attempt to impress Vanessa's very judgmental father. Meanwhile, Kyle helps Kendra and Chale make a fake photo collage of honeymoon pictures to tout on social media.

programme.title: Grief Thief
programme.desc: Vanessa plots her revenge on Kevin after learning he lied his way out of working on a Sunday to attend a football game with Goody. Meanwhile, Kyle dates a new girlfriend; and Chale and Kendra have their first squabble as a couple.

programme.title: The Owl
programme.desc: As Kevin and Chale head to an upstate pawn shop to recover a treasured family heirloom, Kendra and Vanessa create a new online dating profile for Kyle.

programme.title: The Kevin Crown Affair.
programme.desc: When Kevin and Vanessa try to land a security gig at a toy store, they get sidetracked practicing their new business pitch and wind up locked in the store after hours. Also, Chale is having success working at Enzo's.

programme.title: Kevin Moves Metal
programme.desc: As part of a security job, Kevin goes undercover as a janitor at a car dealership, but he accidentally sells a car to a customer and finds himself on track to win top salesman of the month. Also, Chale reveals his phobia of puppets after learning that Kendra used to be into ventriloquism.

programme.title: Unholy War
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin James) and an old nemesis square off over their parish priest's decision about their kids' wedding dates.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin James) organizes a neighborhood watch to avoid having to entertain his annoying brother-in-law.

programme.title: Showroom Showdown
programme.desc: Kevin's (Kevin James) attempt to move from working in an electronics store's warehouse to its air conditioned showroom places him in direct competition with Chale (Ryan Cartwright).

programme.title: Double Date
programme.desc: After Goody and Didi invite the Motts on a weekend getaway with them, Kevin and Donna are offended by the friendship demotion and go online to find new couples to hang out with.

programme.title: Kenny Can Wait
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin James) goes to work for a car service to earn some extra money and is surprised to find his first client is Harry Connick, Jr.

programme.title: Quiet Diet
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin James) tries to diet, but ends up uncovering a deep childhood secret that Chale (Ryan Cartwright) has been hiding.

programme.title: Sting Of Queens: Part One
programme.desc: A last-minute request to help with an old undercover assignment threatens a Mets fantasy camp trip that Kevin (Kevin James) has been planning with his friends.

programme.title: Sting Of Queens: Part Two
programme.desc: While Kevin (Kevin James) and his ex-partner Vanessa (gust star Leah Remini) are in Boston posing as husband and wife in an art forgery sting, Donna (Erinn Hayes) is taken aback when she's passed over for a promotion at work.

programme.title: Dave's Valentine
programme.desc: Ken (Ken Jeong) ruins things for Dave (Albert Tsai) when a longstanding feud with their egotistical neighbor upends Dave's plans for the school Valentine's Day dance.

programme.title: Dicky Wexler's Last Show
programme.desc: Ken (Ken Jeong) and Julie (Kate Simses) disagree over allowing a critically ill stand-up comic (guest star George Wyner) to perform at a benefit show. Allison (Suzy Nakamura) has a crisis of confidence when she learns that her former patient is seeing a new therapist.

programme.title: Ken's An Expert Witness
programme.desc: Ken (Ken Jeong) serves as an expert witness in a courtroom appearance that leaves many doubting his medical expertise. Dave (Albert Tsai) sews a prom dress for Molly (Krista Marie Yu).

programme.title: Dave's Sex Talk
programme.desc: When Ken (Ken Jeong) avoids answering his questions about sex, Dave (Albert Tsai) turns to Julie (Kate Simses) for answers. Molly (Krista Marie Yu) gives Allison (Suzy Nakamura) a wardrobe makeover.

programme.title: Korean Men's Club
programme.desc: To keep Ken (Ken Jeong) from meddling in her book club, Allison (Suzy Nakamura) convinces him to join a civic-minded Korean Men's Club. Molly (Krista Marie Yu) asks Dave (Albert Tsai) for advice on attracting a nerdy classmate.

programme.title: Illuminated

programme.title: Silverfinger
programme.desc: Scott's friends pledge to protect him against an increasingly hostile enemy, while Argent, Isaac and Allison search the past for answers to the shadow creatures. At the same time, Stiles, fearing he is going insane, reaches out to Melissa for help.

programme.title: Riddled
programme.desc: After suffering from hallucinations for some time, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) mysteriously disappears one night and it's up to Scott (Tyler Posey) and the gang to figure out whether he has been kidnapped…and if the Oni had anything to do with it.

programme.title: Letharia Vulpina
programme.desc: Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) mysteriously reappears, but is he himself? Meanwhile, Scott (Tyler Posey) must prevent a disaster and Lydia (Holland Roden) and Allison (Crystal Reed) seek help from an unlikely source...Peter Hale (Ian Bohen).

programme.title: Echo House
programme.desc: Stiles checks himself into a mental hospital named Echo House where he believes he will be safe from the Nogitsune. Will he be as far away from it as he thinks or closer than ever? Meanwhile Scott, Allison and Lydia look for a cure for him.

programme.title: The Fox And The Wolf
programme.desc: While Allison, Derek, Chris and Sheriff Stilinski try to track down Nogitsune, Kira's mother tells the story of the Nogitsune she came to know. Meanwhile, the Nogitsune has taken complete control of Stiles and manages to stay one step ahead.

programme.title: De-Void
programme.desc: With the Nogitsune still in control of their friend Stiles, Scott and Lydia find an unlikely ally in Peter Hale. Elsewhere, the effects of the Nogitsune have given Chris, Alison and Kira some trouble with four out-of-control werewolves.

programme.title: Insatiable
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and company race to rescue Lydia (Holland Roden) from the clutches of evil and get help from a young woman who has escaped from the metal hospital. But the Nogitsune makes a surprise move, resulting in a tragic loss to the group.

programme.title: The Divine Move
programme.desc: In the Season 4 finale, struck by disaster and nearly defeated, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) call on their friends and allies to make one last stand against the Nogitsune. And someone thought dead makes a surprising return.

programme.title: The Dark Moon
programme.desc: Scott and his Pack journey into Mexico to rescue a missing friend.
Scott must turn to an unlikely ally in order to stop Kate's plan.

programme.title: Stream Of Consciousness
programme.desc: When "the Stream" -- an artificial system providing information to all society members through computer chips implanted in their brains -- begins to malfunction, an unlikely, "primitive" man (George Newbern) may be the mankind's only hope.

programme.title: Dark Rain
programme.desc: After a chemical war renders the world's population unable to conceive healthy children, a mother and father must escape from a sinister government agency intent on using their miraculously healthy newborn to repopulate the species.

programme.title: The Camp
programme.desc: In a society imprisoned for generations by extraterrestrial who invaded Earth, an electronics expert (Harley Jane Kozak) discovers that not only are her human jailers really machines, but they also have been holding prisoners for nearly a century.

programme.title: Heart's Desire
programme.desc: A preacher descends upon the 18th century town of Heart's Desire and offers to share his extraordinary powers with four outlaws. But who is this stranger and why has he given these outlaws such deadly powers? Caspar Van Dien and Esai Morales star.

programme.title: Tempests
programme.desc: Attempting to deliver serum to a plague-stricken planet, a pilot (Eric McCormack) and his crew crash land on an unknown moon. Bitten by an alien spider while fixing the ship, the pilot's mind wanders between alternate realities…in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Awakening
programme.desc: A woman unable to feel emotions gets a new lease on life when a brain implant allows her to experience feelings for the first time. But, when the implant malfunctions, driving her towards insanity, she is shocked at the real cause of her problems.

programme.title: New Lease
programme.desc: A remorseless, uncaring scientist (Stephen Lang) and his partner (Michael Ontkean) discover a way to bring life back to the recently deceased. But after the scientist is killed and brought back to life himself, will he choose to live differently?

programme.title: Double Helix
programme.desc: Brilliant geneticist Martin Nodel (Ron Rifkin) unlocks a secret code imprinted on human DNA. But when he tests this code on himself, his "instincts" draw him to a remote location where he finds a trip…to The Outer Limits. Ryan Reynolds co-stars.

programme.title: Dead Man's Switch

programme.title: Exodus To Bleedswell
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: It's Human To Be Humane
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new "Human Humane" committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Never Take Your Wife To A Convention
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: The Computer Age
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: The Vulgar Ring Story
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Who's Lisa
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville�and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Music To Milk By
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: The Man For The Job
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets A Beatnik
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt

programme.title: (Bumper + 3 Mid Show Breaks + End Break)
programme.desc: When you feel surrounded by pressure and fear, it's easy to lose perspective. But what if God's already provided the help you've been praying for? Keep it in context: the battle isn't proof you're losing, it's evidence that you're carrying something.

programme.title: Expecting Change
programme.desc: God doesn't just want to fix you, He wants to restore you. Right now, He's transforming you to impact others. Expect more than a personal breakthrough; expect God to exceed your expectations and bless others through your life.

programme.title: Faith to Stay

programme.title: Try Higher
programme.desc: Don't try harder. In Try Higher, Pastor Steven Furtick shows us that no matter what obstacle stands in our way, we can bring it to the One who has the power to overcome it.

programme.title: On My Way Back
programme.desc: When it feels like God's taking you the long way, remember: He's worthy of your wait. If you're feeling discouraged or struggling with obedience while you wait, start by being honest with God about where you are and trusting that His timing.

programme.title: He Was The One
programme.desc: Assume that God is using you. In He Was The One, Pastor Steven teaches us that instead of judging our current season, we should trust that it is significant to where God is taking us next.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Perdimos todo
programme.desc: Luis comienza a molestar a Silvia todo el tiempo queriendo controlar lo que hace para cuidar del bebé. Magdalena invierte todo su dinero en una empresa fantasma y pierde todo.

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: El muñeco vudú
programme.desc: Germán y Jorjáis encuentran un muñeco vudú, asumen que alguien está haciendo brujería en el edificio. Pedro, Cris y Vanesa tienen problemas con el WiFi de su departamento.

programme.title: Síntomas empáticos
programme.desc: Luis descubre que es él (y no Silvia), quien tiene los síntomas del embarazo. Los vecinos encuentran en la calle carteles pegados de: "Se busca a Jorjáis".

programme.title: La hija de Jorjais
programme.desc: Una mujer le pregunta a Germán sobre el paradero de Jorjáis, y él se sorprende al descubrir que ella es su hija. Vanessa cree que tiene la maldición de la soltería.

programme.title: Niño o niña
programme.desc: Luis ya no sabe que hacer con Silvia porque tiene muchos cambios de humor por el embarazo, pero sus vecinos lo convencen de darle una sorpresa que jamás olvidará.

programme.title: Conserje aprendiz
programme.desc: Lorena acepta hacer un casting para interpretar el papel de La Doña. Germán decide enseñarle a Borrego a ser un gran conserje.

programme.title: El perfume
programme.desc: Magdalena se aprovecha de las náuseas que siente Silvia por el embarazo para que Luis le compre todo lo que ella quiere.

programme.title: Apolonio y la víbora
programme.desc: Vanesa lleva una serpiente al edificio y se le escapa. Ahora tiene que recuperarla sin que los vecinos se enteren. Silvia y Luis toman un curso psicoprofiláctico con una chica que resulta ser la ex de Luis.

programme.title: La chapa
programme.desc: Luis descompone la chapa de la reja, quedando él y Silvia afuera y el resto de los vecinos adentro. En lo que reparan la chapa, los vecinos usan a Luis de mandadero.

programme.title: Los tocatimbres
programme.desc: Germán cree que los timbres del edificio están embrujados, pues alguien los hace sonar constantemente. Luis intenta colocar unas repisas en el cuarto del bebé.

programme.title: Arturo más pordiosero
programme.desc: Los López Pérez se hacen pasar por pordioseros para recibir caridad. Pedro lleva varios días sin bañarse y Cris le exige que lo haga.

programme.title: El parto
programme.desc: Silvia comienza el trabajo de parto en el departamento, no hay tiempo para llegar al hospital. Luis recibirá al bebé con la ayuda de los vecinos.

programme.title: Vecinos consejeros
programme.desc: El hijo de Silvia y Luis no para de llorar y ya no saben qué hacer. Los vecinos les aconsejan cómo cuidar al bebé mientras Germán improvisa un gimnasio en el vestíbulo.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: The most prominent female painter of Latin America, Frida Kahlo, is agonizing in her Coyoacán home.
